General.Name: Hanvey Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Hanvey Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, manufactures, and distributes watch products on an original design manufacturing basis in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company offers female and male watches, metal and non-metal banded, mechanical, and quartz movement watches; and semi-knocked-down kits and watch parts. It develops and operates information technology solutions; trades in and distributes watches; and provides assembly services relating to sales of finished watches. The company serves watch manufacturers, brand owners, and watch importers. It operates in Indonesia, India, Brazil, Australia, and Turkey. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong. Hanvey Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Million Easy Enterprises Limited.
General.Address: Ever Gain Plaza, Tower One, Kwai Chung, Hong Kong
